title: microgonium erosum
intro: Microgonium erosum, also known as the fringed fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. It is native to tropical regions in Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Microgonium erosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
